message:
test(config): expand tests across 11 configuration modules

Add 1410 lines of new tests spanning the entire frankenterm config
crate, providing thorough coverage of configuration parsing, default
values, serialization roundtrips, and validation logic for every
major config module.

Module-by-module breakdown:

  bell.rs (+123 lines):
    - AudibleBell enum variant exhaustiveness
    - VisualBell config defaults and custom timing
    - Bell command string handling and escaping

  cell.rs (+103 lines):
    - CellAttributes bitfield operations (set/clear/toggle)
    - Intensity, underline, blink attribute encoding
    - Foreground/background color attribute storage

  color.rs (+249 lines):
    - RgbColor parsing from hex strings (#rrggbb, #rgb shorthand)
    - AnsiColor to/from index conversion for all 256 palette entries
    - ColorSpec enum variant matching (Default, PaletteIndex, TrueColor)
    - Color arithmetic and interpolation helpers
    - Serde roundtrip for color configuration values

  font.rs (+266 lines):
    - FontAttributes construction and defaults (family, weight, style)
    - FreeTypeLoadTarget variants and their harfbuzz mapping
    - Font size scaling and DPI calculations
    - Font fallback chain ordering logic
    - TextStyle from config string parsing

  frontend.rs (+60 lines):
    - FrontendType enum variant coverage
    - Frontend selection defaults per platform
    - Configuration key mapping and validation

  keys.rs (+148 lines):
    - KeyCode parsing from string representations
    - Modifier flag combinations (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, Super)
    - KeyAssignment enum variant construction
    - Key binding table lookup with modifier matching

  ssh.rs (+101 lines):
    - SshBackend enum variants and defaults
    - SSH config field parsing (host, port, user, identity)
    - Multiplexing domain configuration
    - Agent forwarding and known-hosts settings

  tls.rs (+43 lines):
    - TLS domain configuration defaults
    - Certificate and key path handling
    - Client auth configuration
    - Server-side TLS binding settings

  units.rs (+235 lines):
    - Dimension type construction (Pixel, Cell, Percent)
    - Unit conversion arithmetic between Pixel and Cell
    - UnitOfLength scaling and rounding behavior
    - Point and Size geometric operations
    - Dimension constraint validation (min/max clamping)

  unix.rs (+59 lines):
    - Unix domain socket path configuration
    - Default socket directory discovery
    - Proxy command settings and validation

  window.rs (+31 lines):
    - Window decoration configuration defaults
    - Initial window size and position settings
    - Window class and title configuration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
